---
title: "VIN NBV Diagrams"
phase: thesis
audience: public
status: current
owner: jan
---

This page contains the architecture diagrams for the VIN NBV system.

## Target Selection Contract

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/pose_generation/mermaid/target_selection_contract.mmd
```

## Candidate Sampling Pipeline

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/pose_generation/mermaid/candidate_sampling_pipeline.mmd
```

## Candidate Mixture Families

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/pose_generation/mermaid/candidate_mixture_families.mmd
```

## Rollout Branch Selection

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/pose_generation/mermaid/rollout_branch_selection.mmd
```

## Overall Architecture

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/overall.mmd
```

## Scene Field

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/scene_field.mmd
```

## Pose Encoder

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/pose_encoder.mmd
```

## Global Pool

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/global_pool.mmd
```

## Head

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/head.mmd
```

## Trajectory

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/trajectory.mmd
```

## Semidense Projection

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/semidense_proj.mmd
```

## Semidense Frustum

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../figures/diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/semidense_frustum.mmd
```
